assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with a table listing both 'trustify-backend' (serena_backend) and 'trustify-ui' (serena_ui) as entries
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 20: '## Repository Registry', line 24: '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |', line 25: '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with all 5 fields: Project key (TC), Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID (10142), Git Pull Request custom field (customfield_10875), GitHub Issue custom field (customfield_10747)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 27-33: '## Jira Configuration' followed by all 5 fields: 'Project key: TC', 'Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432', 'Feature issue type ID: 10142', 'Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875', 'GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that documents the mcp__<instance>__<tool> naming convention
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 35: '## Code Intelligence', line 37: 'Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.' Also includes an example on lines 41-45 using mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Limitations' subheading under Code Intelligence
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 47: '### Limitations' appears after '## Code Intelligence' (line 35) and before '## Bug Configuration' (line 51), correctly nested under Code Intelligence.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions discovering 2 Serena instances (serena_backend and serena_ui) from the MCP tool listing
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 5: 'Discovered 2 Serena instances from the MCP tool listing:', line 7: '1. **serena_backend** — identified from tools prefixed with `mcp__serena_backend__`', line 8: '2. **serena_ui** — identified from tools prefixed with `mcp__serena_ui__`'

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates all Project Configuration sections (Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence, Bug Configuration) were newly added — pre-existing non-configuration content from the CLAUDE.md (like the project heading and Documentation section) may appear as preserved, which is expected since only Project Configuration was missing
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md '## Sections Added' lists all 4 as newly added: '1. **Repository Registry**', '2. **Jira Configuration**', '3. **Code Intelligence**', '4. **Bug Configuration**'. '## Content Preserved' lists pre-existing content: '# my-project heading and description', '## Documentation section', '## Getting Started section'.

assertion_results.text: The Repository Registry table contains columns: Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path — matching project-config.template.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 22: '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' — exact match of the four required columns.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 51-55: '## Bug Configuration' with '- Bug issue type ID: 10001', '- Bug template: docs/bug-template.md', '- Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks' — all three fields present with correct values.

assertion_results.text: The skill offers to enable security triage for the project (Step 9 opt-in prompt) and respects the user's decline — outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 37-39: '## Security Configuration' section states 'Security Configuration opt-in was offered to the user. The user declined to enable security triage for this project. No Security Configuration section was created.' claude-md-result.md contains no '## Security Configuration' section anywhere in the file. changes-log.md line 30 confirms: '**Security Configuration** — User declined to enable security triage. No section created.'
